title: 24 Pack 3.8cm x 3cm Battery Operated LED Tea Light Candles, Small Flameless Flickering Votive Candles, Electric Flicker Fake Tealights Bulk for Wedding Halloween Christmas Table Home Decorations
features: 【Long lasting LED flameless tea lights】The flameless flickering tea light candle is powered by a high-quality CR2032 battery (included), providing you with more than 200 hours of soft warm white glow. It is more than enough to keep bright from beginning to end in the long lasting wedding, seaside party, or church prayer. When the battery runs out, you can replace it via the bottom battery clip.

【Rustic mini battery tea lights】These artificial scentless LED votive candles are made of premium white plastic. They have a lifelike melted edge design and soft flickering light that looks like real candles. Ideal for indoor and outdoor daily home decoration such as garden paths, patios, yards, dining tables, anniversaries, the marriage proposal on Valentine's Day, birthdays, Thanksgiving, and other celebration decor.

【Safe and easy to use】No smoke, no high temperature flame, unscented, fireless, these small flameless LED votive tealights bulk are safe for families with pets or kids. You can enjoy a wonderful candle lit dinner full of a festival atmosphere without worrying about dripping wax or a burning smell. Simply slide the switch of the battery fake candles, and you can create joyful and relaxing candle light.

【Widely for various decorations】You can put these flickering flameless battery votive tea candles anywhere, such as candlesticks, window sill, bedrooms, and Christmas fireplace. They are good choices for increasing the active ambiance of grass bridal shower parties, engagement dinners, wedding centerpiece decorations, etc. It is easier to win your lover's favor by matching with red rose petals or luminary bags to create romantic scenes.

【Convenient small holiday decorative tea candles】The size of these prelit electric flicker candles is 3.8 CM in diameter and 3 CM in height (D 1.5 inch x H 1.2 inch), a suitable size for most votive holder, mason jar, jack-o'-lantern, glass cups, and luminary bags. These bright dripless LED candle tea lights battery operated can be reused as the light source for the Halloween carved pumpkin lanterns.
description: Product Description Yakpo 200+ hours long lasting flameless flickering tea light candles Candle size: 1.5" x 1.2" (3.8cm x 3cm) Elegant table decorations Easily create an elegant candlelight scene for a hassle-free experience. Romantic wedding decorations Long-lasting and suitable for setting up a romantic wedding centerpiece in advance. Safe Halloween decorations No need to worry about fire hazards, safe for festival party decorations. Pair these cute tea lights with red rose petals and DIY an unforgettable ceremony Easy battery replacement The battery can be replaced via the bottom clip, easy and convenient operation. High-quality batteries included Each candle is equipped with a high-quality CR2032 battery (200+ hours long lasting). Soft & realistic flame Mimic wax melted edge, no glare, soft and comfortable flickering. Yakpo, adding beauty to life. Specifications: Yakpo flameless candles are meticulously crafted from premium raw materials to provide safety, elegance, and durability.
